scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w apps/api" "npm run dev -w apps/web"
scripts.build:vercel: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.verify:api: npm run typecheck -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/api && npm run test -w apps/api
scripts.verify:web: npm run typecheck -w apps/web && npm run build -w apps/web && npm run test -w apps/web
scripts.verify:shared: npm run typecheck -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run test -w packages/shared
